series_metadata.series_description: OHP 0196 – Provide a checklist of tasks to be completed when an employee is serving on long-term military (180+ days) leave. Additionally, serves as a follow-up checklist to verify all mandatory training missed during the military leave period is completed upon the employee’s return-to-work.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain one (1) year from employee’s return to work date and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain one (1) year from employee’s return to work date and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
